VQE_DroneStockpile.questDescriptionRules.li:
questDescription->Your colony has intercepted erratic signals originating from a nearby long-range transmitter. The station appears crudely assembled, yet its broadcasts carry deep into the surrounding area stirring activity among vagrant drones long thought dormant beneath scrapyards and forgotten ruins.

The source of the transmissions has been traced to an abandoned robotics warehouse. Whoever established the transmission is relying on the facility's reactivated security drones to defend the transmitter in their absence. Ancient units now wander the warehouse halls following their patrol patterns, violently lashing out at any intrusion.

Your settlement and the surrounding area will now experience waves of raids from the awakened machines. As long as the transmitter remains active, hostile drone assaults against your colony will continue.

List of enemies:
[ListOfEnemies]
